title: AI-DLC Rule-Pack Frontmatter (minimal — 01-01 walking skeleton)
description: Minimal frontmatter contract for the walking skeleton. The full multi-axis trigger sub-schema and the binding/enforcement if-then are hardened in plan 01-02.

id.description: Author-assigned slug, globally unique across the store (D-12).

scope.description: Scope tier. Must also match the declaring directory (D-09) via a post-parse check added in 01-03.

triggers.description: D-03: an empty object {} is VALID and means always-in-phase. No minProperties. The taskType/keywords/paths/exclude axes are added in 01-02.
